title: Al-Amin Imprisons Asad b. Yazid and Dispatches Ahmad b. Mazyad to Fight Tahir
description: Ahmad b. Mazyad to Fight Tahir According to `Abd al-Rahman b. Waththib: Asad b. Yazid b. Mazyad related to him that al-Fadl b. al-Rabi ` had sent to him after the death of `Abd al-Rahman al-Abnawi 3 52 (Asad b. Yazid continued,] saying: So I came to him. When I went in to him, I found him sitting in the courtyard of his house, with a piece of paper he had read in his hand. His eyes were red, and he was very angry.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
